---
title: "README"
---

This page is a website-adapted bridge from the repository `README.md`.

## Project Overview

**Absent from Chronic** analyzes workplace absenteeism using pooled CCHS PUMF microdata from two cycles, with focus on chronic-condition relationships to missed workdays.

## Analytical Structure

The project organizes work into:

- A staged data pipeline (`manipulation/`)
- Analytical outputs (`analysis/`), including EDA-3
- Project mission/method/glossary context (`ai/project/`)

## Frontend 22 Context

Frontend 22 is purpose-built for developers and highlights the newly completed EDA-3 report artifacts and derived findings.

## Related Site Pages

- [Mission](../project/mission.qmd)
- [Method](../project/method.qmd)
- [Glossary](../project/glossary.qmd)
- [Pipeline Guide](../pipeline/pipeline-guide.qmd)
- [Cache Manifest](../pipeline/cache-manifest.qmd)
- [EDA](../analysis/eda.qmd)
- [Report](../analysis/report.qmd)
